ddls:
CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "omim_accession" TEXT /* OMIM accession number for the disease or phenotypic series */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease or phenotypic series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease or phenotypic series */,
  "inherited_pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of inheritance (e.g., autosomal dominant, autosomal recessive, X-linked) */,
  "incidence_rate" REAL /* Frequency of the disease in the population */,
  "age_onset" TEXT /* Typical age at which the disease manifests */,
  "treatment_options" TEXT /* Description of available treatment options */,
  "research_status" TEXT /* Current status of research on the disease (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_types" (
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell type */,
  "cell_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cell type */,
  "organ" TEXT /* Organ or tissue where the cell type is primarily found */,
  "development_stage" TEXT /* Stage of development of the cell type (e.g., mature, progenitor) */,
  "function" TEXT /* Primary function of the cell type */,
  "marker_genes" TEXT /* Key genes that are markers for the cell type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_cell_type" (
  "disease_cell_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease-cell type relationship */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease */,
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cell type */,
  "predict_score" REAL /* PrEDiCT score indicating the likelihood of the cell type being affected by the disease */,
  "number_of_causal_genes" INTEGER /* Number of causal genes associated with the disease */,
  "affected_cell_type" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the cell type is affected by the disease */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the PrEDiCT score (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "research_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes from researchers about the relationship */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_cell_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_cell_type_cell_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_type_id") REFERENCES cell_types ("cell_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_cell_type_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "causal_genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "gene_function" TEXT /* Primary function of the gene */,
  "gene_location" TEXT /* Location of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "mutation_type" TEXT /* Type of mutation (e.g., point mutation, deletion, insertion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_genes" (
  "disease_gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease-gene relationship */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene */,
  "gene_expression_level" TEXT /* Level of gene expression in affected tissues */,
  "expression_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the gene expression data (e.g., RNA-seq, microarray) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_genes_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES causal_genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_genes_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., research, clinical, administration) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease being accessed */,
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell type being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_cell_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_type_id") REFERENCES cell_types ("cell_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Date when the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_comments_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)
